entries.title: Added a changelog page in Settings
entries.summary: T3 Code now includes a dedicated changelog view in Settings so you can review recent product updates directly in the app.

entries.title: Improved sidebar run status visibility
entries.summary: The sidebar now provides clearer status feedback for active runs, making it easier to track what the app is doing at a glance.

entries.title: Global ticket labels and templates are now available
entries.summary: You can now manage shared ticket labels and reusable ticket templates from Settings, with built-in defaults available on startup.

entries.title: Orchestration activity is easier to follow
entries.summary: Orchestration timelines now render as clearer thread-style blocks, show active work with cleaner labels, and preserve ticket context more consistently while work is running or paused.

entries.title: Startup recovery is more reliable for interrupted work
entries.summary: T3 Code can better recover stale threads and orchestration runs after restart, and temporary recovery markers are cleared automatically once live activity resumes.

entries.title: Clickable ticket links now work across chat and orchestration views
entries.summary: Ticket references in assistant messages and orchestration updates now open directly from chat, including linked identifiers shown in timeline summaries and badges.

entries.title: Ticket views now focus on the original thread
entries.summary: Ticket details now link back to the origin thread in a simpler, more direct way, reducing clutter in ticket-related navigation.

entries.title: Ticket details stay current after relationship and label changes
entries.summary: Ticket detail views now refresh more reliably when relationships or labels change, so linked information and summaries stay in sync without stale data.

entries.title: Provider selection better respects saved profiles
entries.summary: The provider picker now handles profiled selections more consistently, making it easier to continue with the expected provider and model setup.

entries.title: Board context handling is safer across chat and sidebar flows
entries.summary: The app now applies stronger guards around board context, reducing cases where chat, sidebar, or ticket actions could act on the wrong board state.

entries.title: Review results parsing is more reliable
entries.summary: Review workflows now wait for the finalized assistant output before parsing, reducing stale or incomplete review results.

entries.title: Management board drag and drop is more robust
entries.summary: Improved board interactions for moving tickets, including multi-select dragging and safer rollback behavior when reordering does not complete successfully.

entries.title: Sub-tickets can now be promoted to top-level board tickets
entries.summary: You can now move sub-tickets onto the main board, including support for both single-ticket and bulk promotion flows.

entries.title: Ticket details received visual cleanup
entries.summary: The ticket detail view has been simplified with a cleaner description presentation and more streamlined styling.

entries.title: Follow-up review passes include better context
entries.summary: Later review iterations now carry forward prior review context and delta-focused comparisons, making repeated review cycles easier to follow.

entries.title: Ticket details now focus on the origin thread
entries.summary: Ticket details now show the originating thread more directly instead of aggregating related threads, making it easier to understand where work started.

entries.title: Review feedback is shown in a more consistent format
entries.summary: Review suggestions are now normalized into comments, improving compatibility across older and newer review outputs.

entries.title: Collapsed sidebar navigation is easier to access
entries.summary: A dedicated toggle now remains available when the sidebar is collapsed across chat, settings, and board views.

entries.title: Orchestration progress is clearer across threads
entries.summary: Active orchestration progress now appears in child threads, with a centered status label you can use to jump between the orchestration timeline and the current working thread.

entries.title: Orchestration can now resume with a fresh agent session
entries.summary: Paused orchestration runs can be resumed by restarting the current child session with a fresh agent, giving you a cleaner recovery path when a run needs to continue from a reset state.

entries.title: Stopping sessions is more robust when bindings are already gone
entries.summary: Session shutdown now handles missing provider bindings more gracefully, reducing avoidable failures during stop operations.

entries.title: Ticketing is more resilient and predictable
entries.summary: Ticket loading now falls back more gracefully when snapshot data is unavailable, unbounded ticket lists are preserved by default, and orchestration planning uses more stable ticket ordering.

entries.title: Automated review settings are surfaced more clearly when reviews are turned off
entries.summary: When review cycles are disabled, the UI now makes that state clearer and points you to settings so you can re-enable automated review more easily.

entries.title: Runs can skip review threads entirely when automated review is disabled
entries.summary: If automated review is turned off, orchestration now completes work directly without creating unnecessary review threads, making no-review runs faster and less cluttered.

entries.title: Review output parsing is more resilient
entries.summary: Review results now parse more reliably when returned as prose or fenced JSON, reducing failed review displays from wrapped responses.

entries.title: Orchestration confirmation now shows clearer provider names
entries.summary: The orchestration confirmation dialog now uses normalized provider display names so model selections are easier to understand.

entries.title: Ticket identifiers are now project-scoped
entries.summary: Ticket identifiers now resolve within a project instead of globally, which avoids collisions across projects and keeps ticket references predictable.

entries.title: New threads now inherit the current board context
entries.summary: Starting a new thread from the same project now carries forward the current board ticket stack and scroll position for a smoother workflow.

entries.title: Prompt management for orchestration is now available in Settings
entries.summary: A new Prompts area lets you manage orchestration prompts with global and project-level overrides, editing tools, validation, previews, and backend APIs to support those workflows.

entries.title: Tickets can now track their linked conversation threads
entries.summary: Tickets now keep track of their related threads, improving continuity between ticket work and the conversations created from it.

entries.title: Board and ticket context is now scoped more safely by project
entries.summary: Board state, ticket lookups, and orchestration startup now stay aligned to the selected project, reducing stale or cross-project state issues.

entries.title: Orchestration model selection is now explicit and configurable
entries.summary: You can now choose implementer and reviewer models separately in orchestration settings, with optional per-ticket overrides for more predictable run behavior.

entries.title: Sidebar activity now reflects orchestration work more clearly
entries.summary: Active orchestration runs now show up as working activity in the sidebar, and child orchestration threads are hidden there to reduce clutter.

entries.title: Ticket settings now support deleting comments and replies
entries.summary: Ticket settings now include delete actions for comments and replies, with confirmation before removal.

entries.title: Orchestration timeline and navigation were redesigned
entries.summary: The orchestration timeline now better matches the rest of the app, with cleaner progress states, simpler thread navigation, and less visual noise while following run activity.

entries.title: Automated orchestration reviews are now built into runs
entries.summary: Orchestration can now run automated reviews with dedicated settings, clearer in-app review output, and more reliable handling of structured review responses.

entries.title: Parent tickets now expand into subtasks during orchestration
entries.summary: Orchestration now expands parent tickets into their subtasks so planned work is represented more accurately.
